title: One Punch Man
synopsis: A reviewed anime-bible draft for a compact Z-City patrol loop. Heroes handle ordinary errands while a theatrical challenger tries to turn a local overpass alert into a public duel.

locations.name: Z-City Plaza
locations.description: Open plaza where reports, errands, and public pressure meet.

locations.name: Training Lot
locations.description: Exercise mats, torn concrete, and the place where Saitama dropped a coupon.

locations.name: Apartment Block
locations.description: A quiet block where the strongest hero keeps ordinary routines.

locations.name: Hero Association Kiosk
locations.description: Small official desk where proof turns rumors into action.

locations.name: Ruined Overpass
locations.description: Broken bridge route with challenge marks and monster traces.

locations.name: Monster Alley
locations.description: Back lane where repair parts and monster scraps go missing.

characters.name: Saitama
characters.description: An overwhelmingly strong hero who treats world-ending threats and grocery discounts with the same flat calm.

look.bodyType: plain average build with relaxed posture
look.outfit: yellow bodysuit, white cape, red gloves
look.silhouette: Simple bald head, round cape shape, and bright yellow suit.

goals: recover the grocery coupon before the sale ends
avoid turning every patrol into a duel
secrets: The coupon matters more to him than the public alert does.
memories: A grocery coupon fell out near the training lot after morning exercise.
Sonic keeps trying to make everything into a dramatic challenge.

characters.name: Genos
characters.description: A serious cyborg hero collecting evidence and repair parts while overanalyzing Saitama's routines.

look.bodyType: lean athletic build with mechanical arms
look.outfit: black tactical clothes with gold cyborg arms
look.silhouette: Spiky hair, glowing eyes, and heavy mechanical forearms.

memories: A spare cyborg core was lost after a skirmish in Monster Alley.
Saitama said the grocery coupon is important, so the coupon is important.

characters.name: Mumen Rider
characters.description: A brave cyclist hero who needs real proof before sending civilians into panic.

look.outfit: green cyclist armor, cream chest plate, utility belt
look.silhouette: Helmet, cyclist armor, and square heroic stance.

goals: collect proof of the overpass threat
memories: A jagged monster scale was seen near the ruined overpass.
The Association radio keeps catching static from Monster Alley.

characters.name: Tatsumaki
characters.description: An impatient psychic hero who dislikes slow paperwork and weaker people making danger worse.

look.outfit: black dress with floating psychic posture

goals: keep the plaza from wasting time
spot whether the alert is real
memories: The overpass pressure feels real, but the reports are too sloppy.

characters.name: Speed-o'-Sound Sonic
characters.description: A flashy ninja rival trying to turn local danger into a dramatic duel.

look.outfit: dark ninja outfit with purple accents

goals: force a public duel near the overpass
secrets: Sonic left the challenge marks near the overpass.
memories: Challenge marks near the overpass point back toward the plaza.
Monster scraps make the alert look worse than it is.

conflicts.title: A rival challenger wants attention
conflicts.objective: Leave signs, collect monster scraps, and force the caped bald hero into a public duel before the alert clears.
conflicts.clue: Sharp challenge marks point from the ruined overpass back toward the plaza.

artifacts.name: Grocery coupon
artifacts.description: A limited supermarket discount coupon. Saitama cares about this more than the threat level.
artifacts.clue: The coupon tore beside the training timer after morning exercise.

artifacts.name: Spare cyborg core
artifacts.description: A compact repair component Genos can use after patrol damage.
artifacts.clue: The core was knocked into Monster Alley during a skirmish.

artifacts.name: Monster scale
artifacts.description: A jagged scale from an unknown monster. It proves the overpass alert is real.
artifacts.clue: The scale is physical proof the kiosk report is missing.

artifacts.name: Challenge note
artifacts.description: A dramatic note promising a duel near the overpass.
artifacts.clue: The handwriting makes the threat theatrical instead of random.

artifacts.name: Association radio
artifacts.description: A small radio tuned to Hero Association alert chatter.
artifacts.clue: The radio cannot escalate the alert without proof.
